hero_subtitle: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a unified view to track onboarding risk, monitor review queues, and oversee approval status across compliance workflows with audit-ready clarity.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive visibility fades across onboarding risk
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to track onboarding risk and approval status when data remains scattered across multiple compliance providers. This limits clear oversight of review queues, case progress, and risk exposure, making audit readiness and decision control more difficult to maintain.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies data from compliance providers, review queues, case workflows and risk signals into a single dashboard so leadership can track onboarding status and audit-ready risk exposure clearly.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY compiles provider onboarding checks, applies risk rules, routes reviews, records approvals and preserves evidence within a clear compliance control workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that connects onboarding risk data into clear workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence for better compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a governed compliance layer supporting audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise deployment for onboarding risk management.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive onboarding risk monitoring
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding risk dashboards track approval status
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports onboarding risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for scalable executive compliance dashboards
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for onboarding risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides an enterprise layer that connects onboarding data, risk signals and approval status into one dashboard for executives, enabling scalable compliance risk visibility and decision control.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY track onboarding risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures onboarding risk through configurable rules, provider outputs, case workflows and approval paths, allowing teams to monitor, triage and escalate risks consistently across jurisdictions and products.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding decision logs, case history and supporting evidence with audit logs to support review readiness, regulatory inspection and internal governance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing onboarding providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYB and screening providers, integrating their results into connected workflows without disrupting your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYB and screening providers and structures their outputs into controlled onboarding risk workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Review onboarding risk visibility and approval status
final_description: See how SFTY connects provider outputs into a connected dashboard for structured onboarding risk and audit-ready review workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
